SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AddItemTab
JavaFX tab for adding new Game entries to the library.
Database
Manages database connectivity and initialization using the Singleton pattern.
DBConfig
Utility class responsible for persisting and loading database configuration.
DBConst
Centralized database schema definitions including table names, column names, constraints, and SQL creation statements.
DeleteItemTab
JavaFX tab for deleting existing Game entries from the library.
Developer
Represents a Developer entity in the system.
DeveloperDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Developer entities.
DeveloperTable
Data Access Object implementation for Developer entities.
Game
Represents a Game entity in the system.
GameDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Game entities.
GameTable
Data Access Object implementation for Game entities.
HelloApplication
Main JavaFX application class responsible for application lifecycle, database initialization, and UI navigation.
HelloController
Controller class for handling user interactions in the Hello view.
IntroAnimation
Handles the intro animation displayed when application starts.
Launcher
Entry point launcher for the JavaFX application.
Log
Provides logging functionality for the application.
LoginScene
Builds and manages the database login scene.
NodeConsts
Provides reusable UI components and constants.
Platform
Represents a Platform entity in the system.
PlatformDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Platform entities.
PlatformTable
Data Access Object implementation for Platform entities.
StatisticsTab
JavaFX tab for displaying statistical insights of games in the library using a pie chart.
UpdateItemTab
Tab responsible for updating existing Game entries in the library.
ViewItemTab
Tab responsible for displaying all Game entries in a scrollable table layout.
